stem: Which of the following is/are the reason(s) for not over-using ultra-violet lamps to produce a suntan effect? (1) Ultra-violet radiation is highly penetrating and will damage body tissue. (2) Ultra-violet radiation has a strong heating effect and will damage body tissue. (3) Over exposure to ultra-violet radiation may cause skin cancer.

options.C: X-rays, infra-red, visible light, ultra-violet, microwaves
options.D: X-rays, ultra-violet, visible light, infra-red, microwaves
